title: CVE-2026-1015 - IBM InfoSphere Information Server Cross-Site Scripting

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - CVE-2026-1015 - IBM InfoSphere Information Server Cross-Site
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '11.7.1.6'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 11.7.1.6 any (msg:"CDB APEX - CVE_2026_1015___IBM_InfoSphere"; sid:5758994; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 11.7.1.6 any (msg:"CDB APEX CVE_2026_1015___IBM_InfoSphere"; sid:7956307; rev:1;)
